title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
